ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_market_data" (
  "Unnamed: 0" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily record */,
  "Date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "Open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "High" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "Low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "Close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "Volume" REAL /* Volume of transactions */,
  "Close_lag1" REAL /* Closing price from the previous day */,
  "ret_daily" REAL /* Daily return */,
  "ret_pct" REAL /* Percentage return */,
  "Adj_Close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("Unnamed: 0")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_history" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of transactions */,
  "lag1_close_price" REAL /* Closing price from the previous day */,
  "daily_return" REAL /* Daily return */,
  "pct_return" REAL /* Percentage return */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the trader belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the trader has */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance rating of the trader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* Expected return of the stock */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "risk_type" TEXT /* Type of risk (e.g., market risk, credit risk) */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the level of risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted closing price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* Type of portfolio (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "target_return" REAL /* Target return for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio content record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_contents_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_contents_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of market indicator (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market indicator */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., actual, forecast) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "news_type" TEXT /* Type of news (e.g., earnings, mergers, acquisitions) */,
  "relevance" REAL /* Relevance of the news to the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the earnings report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue reported */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* Earnings per share reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of earnings report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "surprise" REAL /* Surprise factor of the earnings report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation from the analyst */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of economic indicator (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the indicator (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)
